title: Hosted Login Configuration
description: Login page branding, auth methods, and registration settings. Sent to PUT /organizations/{org_id}/login-config by 03-setup-hosted-login.sh.

branding.description: Visual branding for the hosted login page

page_title.description: Browser tab title for the login page

hide_powered_by.description: Whether to hide the 'Powered by Auth Mesh' footer

content.description: Text content shown on the login page

welcome_message.description: Heading shown on the login form

signup_message.description: Heading shown on the signup form

invitation_only.description: Restrict access to invited users only. Overrides signup_enabled when true.

default_role.description: Role assigned to newly registered users

require_email_verification.description: Require email verification before granting access

collect_name.description: Show name field on registration form

post_logout_redirect_uri.description: URL to redirect to after logout

remember_me_enabled.description: Show 'Remember me' checkbox on login form

accept_invite_url.description: URL the auth service redirects to from /accept-invite when the invitation code is valid. The auth service appends ?code=<...> to this URL. Origin must match an entry in accept_invite_allowed_origins. Leave unset to use the bundled fallback page.

accept_invite_error_url.description: URL the auth service redirects to when the invitation code is used / expired / unknown. The auth service appends ?reason=used|expired|not_found|invalid. Origin must match an entry in accept_invite_allowed_origins. Leave unset to use the bundled fallback page.

accept_invite_allowed_origins.description: Allowlist of origins (scheme + host + optional port) that accept_invite_url and accept_invite_error_url may target. Mirrors the OAuth redirect_uris allowlist pattern — prevents open-redirect even if the config row is mutated out-of-band. Format: 'https://app.example.com' (no path, no trailing slash). 03-setup-hosted-login.sh will smart-default this from oauth-client.json's redirect_uris if you leave it empty.
